name: American West Metals Limited
analysis: AW1's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 54% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.0450, stop A$0.0386, target A$0.0500 (0.78:1) — then trail it.
